prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **C1J-772** (1.4L turbocharged inline-4) with a **C1J-772B** block bored to 82.5mm (from 76mm) and stroked to 82mm (from 77mm) using a **Dynospark forged crankshaft** and **JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons**, paired with **Manley H-beam connecting rods** for a final displacement of 1,764cc. Retain the **Garrett T3/T4 hybrid turbo** (T3 .63 A/R compressor, T4 .82 A/R turbine) but upgrade the internals with a **Precision Turbo 6262 billet compressor wheel** and **Inconel turbine wheel** for 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) boost, supported by a **TurboSmart Race Port 45mm wastegate** and **Tial MV-R 50mm blow-off valve**.

Fuel & Ignition: Replace the stock **Renault/Bosch K-Jetronic mechanical injection** with a **Motec M150 ECU** controlling **ID1000x injectors** (1,000cc/min) and a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump**, paired with a **Radium Engineering dual-core fuel rail** and **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor**. Ignition is handled by a **MSD 6AL-2 digital ignition box** with **NGK R7437-9 racing plugs** gapped at 0.024", firing through **Magnecor KV85 Competition spark plug wires**.

Drivetrain & Chassis: Swap the stock **353M gearbox** (5-speed) for a **Renault 365 gearbox** (from the R5 Turbo Maxi) with **Hewland FTR close-ratio gears** (2.61, 1.84, 1.39, 1.11, 0.91) and a **Peloquin limited-slip differential** (40% lock). Suspension is fully rebuilt with **Ohlins TTX25 coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 250mm travel) and **SuperPro polybushings** at all pivot points. Braking is upgraded to **AP Racing CP6640 front calipers** (4-piston) with **330mm two-piece rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**, while the rear retains the stock **Renault 255mm discs** but with **Brembo 08.5150.10 calipers** and **Hawk HT-10 pads**.
estetica: Body: Replace the stock fiberglass panels with **Rocket Bunny R5 Turbo 2 widebody kit** (Pandem-style, 50mm wider fenders) in **3M Gloss Black vinyl wrap** with **carbon fiber front splitter** (custom-made by **Seibon**) and **Voltex GT-Wing Type 2** (1,800mm span, 300mm chord) mounted on **custom aluminum pedestals**. The rear bumper is replaced with a **Liberty Walk R5 Turbo 2 diffuser** (carbon fiber, 3-piece) and **custom side skirts** (hand-laid fiberglass, matching the Rocket Bunny kit).

Interior: Gut the stock interior and install **Sparco Pro ADV seats** (fixed-back, FIA 8862-2009 certified) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** (ASM model). The dashboard is replaced with a **Motec C127 digital dash** (12.3" display) and **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel** (350mm, suede). The roll cage is a **Custom Cages T45 steel full cage** (10-point, FIA-spec) with **Schroth Enduro harness bar** and **carbon fiber door cards** (custom-made by **Status Racing**).

Wheels & Aero: Fit **BBS RS-GT II wheels** (15x9 +15 ET front, 15x10 +20 ET rear) with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires** (225/45/15 front, 265/40/15 rear). For aero, add **custom aluminum canards** (front bumper, 3 per side) and **carbon fiber side splitters** (hand-made by **AeroCatch**), along with a **custom aluminum rear diffuser** (integrated with the Liberty Walk kit) featuring **3x 50mm Gurney flaps**. The hood is replaced with a **carbon fiber vented unit** (by **RP Composites**) with **NACA ducts** feeding the turbo.
